items.name: Cinematic Launch Hero
items.summary: Editorial launch hero with controlled motion, product context, and a decisive conversion path.
items.description: A complete opening system for premium product launches. It combines asymmetrical typography, a technical metadata rail, product proof, and a responsive call-to-action composition without falling into a generic centered hero.

preview.title: Ship the system, not another screen.
preview.description: A complete creative commerce surface from source to install.

files.content:
export function CinematicLaunchHero() { return (

items.name: Editorial Product Grid
items.summary: A responsive catalog browser with search, category filters, pricing, sorting, and expressive list geometry.
items.description: A marketplace browsing surface designed for dense technical products and visual assets. It supports category and subcategory filtering, free and paid products, sorting, metadata, and responsive layouts while avoiding repetitive equal-card composition.

preview.title: Browse by intent.
preview.description: Product discovery with a technical filter rail and editorial result field.

items.name: Spatial Gallery System
items.summary: Layered visual gallery with controlled depth, variable crops, keyboard navigation, and mobile fallbacks.
items.description: A visual showcase system for design modules, campaigns, and spatial objects. It prioritizes one dominant object, controlled supporting content, and readable metadata rather than a generic image grid.

preview.title: Objects with purpose.
preview.description: Large and small fields arranged with controlled negative space.

items.name: Marketplace Detail System
items.summary: Complete product detail flow with preview, code files, dependencies, license, export, add, and install actions.
items.description: A production-oriented detail page for digital goods. It combines product narrative, live visual preview, technical metadata, compatibility, file manifest, export, and safe installation planning.

preview.title: Inspect before install.
preview.description: Every dependency, file, and target path remains visible before installation.

items.name: Red Signal Design Kit
items.summary: A dark and light token set using restrained red for focus, validation, progress, and execution states.
items.description: A focused design system package with layered dark surfaces, warm light surfaces, editorial typography, compact technical labels, controlled red signals, and accessible state mapping.

preview.title: Red means action.
preview.description: A controlled accent system for important states rather than decoration.

items.name: Motion Storyboard
items.summary: Purposeful route, panel, reveal, and reduced-motion presets for editorial product experiences.
items.description: A motion preset collection for route transitions, masked labels, active-state movement, preview changes, and reduced-motion fallbacks. It avoids permanent loops and decorative movement.

preview.title: Move with reason.
preview.description: Transitions communicate state and spatial continuity without delaying work.

items.name: Import Workbench
items.summary: File, paste, and URL ingestion with normalization, validation, conflict notes, and local library storage.
items.description: A complete browser-side import workflow for JSON, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Markdown, and text files. URL ingestion is proxied through a guarded server route with protocol, host, size, timeout, and content-type checks.

preview.title: Bring systems in.
preview.description: Inspect source, normalized metadata, warnings, and generated files before saving.

items.name: Agent Release Console
items.summary: A technical execution surface for plan, changes, validation, build, release evidence, and capability truth.
items.description: An agent workflow surface that distinguishes request, plan, proposed changes, commands, tool results, validation, warnings, errors, and approvals without consumer chat bubbles or fake live states.

preview.title: Evidence before release.
preview.description: Plans, diffs, build evidence, and blockers remain distinct and inspectable.

items.name: Pricing Narrative
items.summary: A value-led pricing system with comparison logic, licensing, usage boundaries, and focused conversion actions.
items.description: Pricing built as a narrative rather than three identical cards. The system highlights fit, capability boundaries, support, licensing, and next action with clear hierarchy and accessible comparison.

preview.title: Choose by operating model.
preview.description: Free, commercial, and enterprise paths arranged by real usage needs.

items.name: Creator Profile System
items.summary: Verified creator identity, products, collections, licenses, usage, updates, and support context.
items.description: A compact creator profile for a technical marketplace. It provides trust signals, portfolio context, update history, product collections, licensing, and support without social-network clutter.

preview.title: Built by verified systems people.
preview.description: Identity, work, updates, and licensing in one compact technical surface.
